title: Soulful Conversations with Bithika Anand: Nish Shetty, Senior Partner, Clifford Chance, Singapore
description: This episode of Soulful Conversations with Bithika Anand features Nish Shetty, Senior Partner in the Litigation and Dispute Resolution practice at Clifford Chance, Singapore. With a distinguished career spanning over three decades, Shetty has advised on complex cross border disputes across Asia and Europe and is widely recognised as a leading figure in international arbitration. He is the founder and former Chairman of the SIAC Users’ Council, Co-Chair of the Council of Arbitration of the Mumbai
